flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at University of Wisconsin-Platteville rose 10% between 2021 and 2024 ($7.8k → $8.6k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at University of Wisconsin-Platteville fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.1% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at University of Wisconsin-Platteville rose 15% between 2021 and 2024 (28.5% → 32.7%).
